2010-02-27.abstract: Tareq al-Fadhli, who knew Osama bin Laden, is at the center of Yemen’s turbulent recent history and is now redefining himself as an ally of the United States.

2010-02-27.title: The Hague: Srebrenica Trial
2010-02-27.abstract: The trial of a Bosnian Serb general accused of playing a key role in the 1995 massacre in Srebrenica, Bosnia, opened at the war crimes tribunal in The Hague on Friday.

2010-02-28.title: Earthquake and Aftershocks Shake Chile
2010-02-28.abstract: More than 200 are confirmed dead after the magnitude-8.8 temblor toppled homes, buckled roads and triggered dozens of aftershocks. NBC's George Lewis Reports. (Video: MSNBC)

2010-02-28.title: Officials Breathe Sigh of Relief as Tsunami Passes
2010-02-28.abstract: The threat of lethal destruction from tsunami waves receded after alarms were lifted for the Pacific Basin.

2010-02-28.title: Mario Andretti Turns 70 – Goes to Bahrain
2010-02-28.abstract: Mario Andretti, winner of the F1 world title and the Indianapolis 500, turned 70 on Sunday and will go to celebrate the 60th anniversary of the F1 series at the first race, in Bahrain, in two weeks.

2010-02-28.title: Frantic Rescue Efforts in Chile as Troops Seek to Keep Order
2010-02-28.abstract: The police tried to disperse crowds in Concepción after outbreaks of looting, but authorities eventually settled on a system that allowed staples to be taken.
